title: City Brake Active System Structure Description - City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: City Brake Active System Structure Description - City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit
City Brake Active System/Radar Control Unit

The City Brake Active System radar/control unit consists of a radar transmitter, light-receiving lens, LED dedicated for blockage detection, and ECU. Three laser beams are emitted from the radar transmitter toward the front of the vehicle, and the distance to the object is calculated by measuring and calculating the time it takes for the laser beams reflected from forward obstacles and other objects to return to the light receiving lens. It also receives related switch and sensor signals from the F-CAN line and outputs control signals in each control to each unit.
City Brake Active System radar detection range is 6.2 m from the vehicle tip, 27° in the left-right direction, and 12° in the up-down direction.
